definitions.name: balance
definitions.normalized_expression: SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_charges - SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_payments AS balance
source_tables: SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID
source_columns: SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_charges

SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_payments

definitions.name: collection_rate_pct
definitions.normalized_expression: CASE WHEN SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_charges = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_payments / SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_charges * 100, 1) END AS collection_rate_pct
source_tables: SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID
source_columns: SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_charges

SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_payments

SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_charges

definitions.name: los_category
definitions.normalized_expression: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(day, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_admsn_time, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_disch_time) <= 2 THEN 'Short' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_admsn_time, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_disch_time) <= 5 THEN 'Medium' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_admsn_time, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_disch_time) <= 10 THEN 'Long' ELSE 'Extended' END
